configuration.name: arm vexpress
configuration.PROGRAM_PARAMS: -kernel $USER_HOME$/work/vexpress/vmlinuz-5.0.0-13-generic-lpae -initrd $USER_HOME$/work/vexpress/initrd.img-5.0.0-13-generic-lpae -M vexpress-a15 -serial mon:stdio -m 1024 -append "root=/dev/mmcblk0 rw mem=1024M raid=noautodetect rootwait console=ttyAMA0,38400n8 devtmpfs.mount=0" -sd $USER_HOME$/work/vexpress/vexpress-4G.img -dtb $USER_HOME$/work/vexpress/vexpress-v2p-ca15-tc1.dtb -nographic
